true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to decrease the <color=#28d9ed>cooldown</color> of <color=#28d9ed>You're Fired!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to decrease the <color=#28d9ed>cooldown</color> of <color=#28d9ed>You're Fired!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to decrease the <color=#28d9ed>cooldown</color> of <color=#28d9ed>You're Fired!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to decrease the <color=#28d9ed>cooldown</color> of <color=#28d9ed>You're Fired!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease the <color=#28d9ed>cooldown</color> of <color=#28d9ed>You're Fired!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【You're Fired!】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>スキルターン</color>を <color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。

SKT_BURST_1.effect_jp: WGダメージ+1\n火傷+2ターン(効果抵抗無視)
SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: WG减少量+1\n灼伤+2回合(无视效果抵抗)

SKT_BURST_2.effect_jp: 出血+2ターン(効果抵抗無視)
SKT_BURST_2.effect_zh: 出血+2回合(无视效果抵抗)

SKT_BURST_3.effect: Attacks all enemies\nDetonates Bleeding & Burned\nResets Cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Ruthless Performance Review</color>
SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 敵全体攻撃\n出血および火傷破裂\n【残酷な業績評価】スキルターン初期化
SKT_BURST_3.effect_kr: 적 전체 공격\n출혈 및 화상 폭발\n잔혹한 고과 평가 쿨타임 초기화
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 攻击全体敌人\n引爆出血与灼伤\n重置<color=#28d9ed>残酷绩效评估</color>冷却时间

true_desc_levels.1:
(Passive Effect) At the start of battle, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the fastest enemy for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, ignoring <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color>.
When the caster dies, increases the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of ally <color=#28d9ed>Strikers</color> by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>.
(Active Effect) Attacks an enemy. Damage increases by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> for every <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> the target has.
After attacking, increases the damage of ally <color=#28d9ed>Strikers</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>. (Max 3 stacks)

When attacking <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color>, all damage dealt by the caster increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.

(Active Effect) Attacks an enemy. Damage increases by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> for every <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> the target has.
After attacking, increases the damage of ally <color=#28d9ed>Strikers</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>. (Max 3 stacks)

When attacking <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color>, all damage dealt by the caster increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.

When attacking <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color>, all damage dealt by the caster increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp:
(パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、スピードが最も速い敵の効果抵抗を無視し、<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。自身が倒れた時、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃型</color>の味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>UPさせる。
(アクティブ効果)敵単体にダメージを与える。対象の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color><color=#28d9ed>1個</color>につき、ダメージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPする。
攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃型</color>の味方のダメージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。(最大3回累積)

<color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>攻撃時、自身のすべての攻撃ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
(패시브 효과) 전투 시작 시, 속도가 가장 빠른 적에게 효과 저항을 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
자신 사망 시 아군 <color=#28d9ed>공격형</color>의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 증가시킵니다.
(엑티브 효과) 적을 공격합니다. 대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color> <color=#28d9ed>1개</color>마다 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가합니다.
공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>공격형</color> 동료의 피해량을 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.(최대 3회 누적)

<color=#ffd732>이레귤러 몬스터</color> 공격 시 자신의 모든 공격 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
(被动效果)战斗开始时,对速度最快的敌人无视效果抗性赋予<color=#28d9ed>灼伤</color><color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
自身死亡时,使<color=#28d9ed>攻击型</color>友军的行动值增加<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。
(主动效果)攻击敌人。目标每拥有1个<color=#28d9ed>减益效果</color>,伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。
攻击后,使<color=#28d9ed>攻击型</color>友军的伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>(最多叠加3次)。

对<color=#ffd732>异常怪物</color>造成的伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。
true_desc_levels.2_zh:
(被动效果)战斗开始时,对速度最快的敌人无视效果抗性赋予<color=#28d9ed>灼伤</color><color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
自身死亡时,使<color=#28d9ed>攻击型</color>友军的行动值增加<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。
(主动效果)攻击敌人。目标每拥有1个<color=#28d9ed>减益效果</color>,伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。
攻击后,使<color=#28d9ed>攻击型</color>友军的伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>(最多叠加3次)。

对<color=#ffd732>异常怪物</color>造成的伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。

true_desc_levels.1:
Before using the skill, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, then attacks.
Damage increases by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> for every <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> the target has, and if the target is a Boss, ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of Defense.

When attacking <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color>, gains an <color=#28d9ed>Extra Turn</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: 攻撃前、対象に<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>と<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、敵にダメージを与える。\n対象の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color><color=#28d9ed>1個</color>につき、ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPし、対象がボスの場合、防御力を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視する。\n<color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>攻撃時、<color=#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得します。

true_desc_levels.5_jp: スキル使用前、対象に<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>と<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与し、敵にダメージを与える。この効果は効果抵抗を無視する。\n対象の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color><color=#28d9ed>1個</color>につき、ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPし、対象がボスの場合、防御力を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視する。\n<color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>攻撃時、<color=#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr:
스킬 사용 전, 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여한 후 적을 공격합니다.
대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color> <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 마다 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가하며 대상이 보스인 경우 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시합니다.

<color=#ffd732>이레귤러 몬스터</color> 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>추가 턴</color>을 얻습니다.
